items.title_cn: OpenAI limits GPT-5.6 rollout after government request, says restrictions shouldn’t be the norm
items.title_en: OpenAI limits GPT-5.6 rollout after government request, says restrictions shouldn’t be the norm
items.summary_cn: “We don’t believe this kind of government access process should become the long-term default,” says OpenAI. “It keeps the best tools from users, developers, enterprises, cyber defenders, and global partners who need them.”
items.summary_en: “We don’t believe this kind of government access process should become the long-term default,” says OpenAI. “It keeps the best tools from users, developers, enterprises, cyber defenders, and global partners who need them.”

items.summary_en: The hire marks OpenAI's latest push into India, expanding offices, partnerships and hiring.

items.title_cn: Show HN: Smart model routing directly in Claude, Codex and Cursor
items.title_en: Show HN: Smart model routing directly in Claude, Codex and Cursor
items.summary_cn:
We built a model router that plugs into coding agents (e.g. Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, etc.) and intelligently sends requests to the best model to serve them. Here's a quick demo of running it locally: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=isKhAyivtfM.

At Weave, we write most of our code with AI, and it's been getting more expensive. This came to a head when Opus 4.7 was released and, th
items.summary_en:
We built a model router that plugs into coding agents (e.g. Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, etc.) and intelligently sends requests to the best model to serve them. Here's a quick demo of running it locally: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=isKhAyivtfM.

At Weave, we write most of our code with AI, and it's been getting more expensive. This came to a head when Opus 4.7 was released and, th

items.title_cn: Why everyone from OpenAI to SpaceX is building their own chips (and turning up the heat on Nvidia)
items.title_en: Why everyone from OpenAI to SpaceX is building their own chips (and turning up the heat on Nvidia)
items.summary_cn: Nvidia has dominated the AI chip market for years, but the era of total dependence might be ending.   OpenAI just shared its plans to spice things up with Jalapeño, its custom inference chip built with Broadcom, joining Google, Apple, and SpaceX in a growing list of companies building their way out of single-supplier risk. The goal is less of a […]
items.summary_en: Nvidia has dominated the AI chip market for years, but the era of total dependence might be ending.   OpenAI just shared its plans to spice things up with Jalapeño, its custom inference chip built with Broadcom, joining Google, Apple, and SpaceX in a growing list of companies building their way out of single-supplier risk. The goal is less of a […]

items.title_cn: It’s not about Anthropic vs. OpenAI anymore
items.title_en: It’s not about Anthropic vs. OpenAI anymore
items.summary_cn: AI models have progressed to the point where their capabilities have real political consequences. Dealing with those consequences will require collective action.
items.summary_en: AI models have progressed to the point where their capabilities have real political consequences. Dealing with those consequences will require collective action.

items.title_cn: Show HN: OpenKnowledge – open source AI-first alternative to Obsidian/Notion
items.title_en: Show HN: OpenKnowledge – open source AI-first alternative to Obsidian/Notion
items.summary_cn:
Hi HN, Nick here. We’re launching OpenKnowledge (https://openknowledge.ai/), a “what you see is what you get” markdown editor that has direct integrations with Claude, Codex, and other agents. Available as MacOS app or Web UI+CLI. Fully free/local and OSS.

We built this because we wanted a Notion-like experience for writing and sharing markdown files across our team. Obsidian is the best alternative we tr
items.summary_en:
Hi HN, Nick here. We’re launching OpenKnowledge (https://openknowledge.ai/), a “what you see is what you get” markdown editor that has direct integrations with Claude, Codex, and other agents. Available as MacOS app or Web UI+CLI. Fully free/local and OSS.

We built this because we wanted a Notion-like experience for writing and sharing markdown files across our team. Obsidian is the best alternative we tr
